acceptance_results.criterion: Document full-system service inventory, verification commands, pass/fail status, risks, and unresolved blockers.
Run repository-level verification and identify blockers without making dependency, vendor, secret, or merge-conflict changes.
evidence: common and service go test sweeps

cleanup_notes: Stopped bounded landing-web runtime server after HTTP 200 proof.
Tore down `timwe-codex-fullsystem` compose project and removed temporary `shared-network` after runtime smoke.
completed_work: Resolved runtime schema blockers through TMP-045 db-bootstrap.
Resolved webspa-admin reproducibility through TMP-046 tracked source.
Resolved landing-web dependency audit through TMP-047 Next/React/PostCSS remediation.
Reran full local build, Go test, frontend build/test, dependency audit, and bounded compose runtime smoke evidence.
known_gaps: Production deploy and live TIMWE/Auth0/provider credential flows were not executed.
Acquisition-api starts with Redis fallback under .env.example because its runtime Redis config points at 127.0.0.1.
Next 16 warns that middleware.ts is deprecated in favor of proxy; build and runtime smoke pass.
operator_message: All tracked release-verification slices are complete in the isolated worktree. Local verification gates pass with the documented runtime caveats.
risk_notes: Primary local main remains divergent and is intentionally preserved; do not reset or merge it from this agent branch without maintainer-owned reconciliation.
summary: Full-system release verification refreshed and all tracked blocker slices are complete in the isolated worktree.
